alerts.title: US and Iran trade direct strikes; missile defense systems activated in Gulf
alerts.summary: PBS, AP News, and BBC report US military struck Iranian radar and military sites while Iran fired missiles at US troops in Kuwait. Multiple sources confirm active air defense operations and incident escalation beyond prior kinetic exchanges. Threat level raised to 9 (CRITICAL — IMMINENT ESCALATION) per global_metrics.

alerts.title: Trump halts Netanyahu's Beirut offensive; partial Lebanon ceasefire announced
alerts.summary: Reuters, Times of Israel, Washington Post, and Time Magazine report Trump directly intervened to postpone Israeli strikes on Beirut, with Netanyahu appearing to back down. Lebanon announces partial ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah, though limited attacks continue. Development marks sharp reversal from previous order to strike Dahieh suburbs.

alerts.title: Iran-linked hackers escalate cyber retaliation after US-Israel strikes
alerts.summary: PBS and Industrial Cyber report surge in cyber retaliation campaigns by Iran-linked threat actors targeting US and allied government, defense, and critical infrastructure sectors. Timing coincides with kinetic US strikes on Iranian military sites, indicating coordinated multi-domain response.

alerts.title: Iran declares talks suspended, threatens Strait of Hormuz closure and breakout acceleration
alerts.summary: Rybar (2 June, ~123K views) cites Iranian IRGC statement declaring cessation of negotiations, announcing full closure of Strait of Hormuz, and Bab el-Mandeb blockade plans in response to US-Israel 'provocations.' Nuclear breakout timeline remains 1-2 weeks at 60% enrichment per global_metrics.

alerts.title: Iran restores 18 underground missile sites; reconstitution pace exceeds US expectations
alerts.summary: CNN, Times of Israel, and Jerusalem Post confirm Iran has reopened entrances to 18 missile bases struck during prior US campaign, with reconstruction timeline 'exceeding all expectations.' Development materially reduces warning time for renewed Iranian ballistic missile salvos against regional targets.

analysis_note: US-Iran direct kinetic exchange, Trump's emergency intervention in Israel-Lebanon theater, and Iranian cyber and nuclear escalation amid collapsed diplomacy signal high-risk multi-front instability with reduced diplomatic off-ramps.
